title: "First Day of the Week" Setting Applied to Workspaces (NOT Globally)
excerpt: I looked through all the other requests, and none identify this setting as applied to specific workspaces. The fact is, “First Day of the Week” may mean different things to different global agencies. In this, my team wor…

posts.author: nathalie.camayd (Nathalie Camayd)
posts.cookedHtml:
I looked through all the other requests, and none identify this setting as applied to specific workspaces. The fact is, “First Day of the Week” may mean different things to different global agencies. In this, my team works mostly in the U.S. and we have vendors work on Monday-Friday business days. However, my company itself is Global and based out of Israel, so the setting for weekends are Friday-Saturday.
Most of the company would like to keep this setting, but a few would like to switch to U.S. settings. Allowing us to do so at the Workplace setting would allow each team to manage that setting for their respective team’s workspaces.
